mapper.select: select * from review where orderId = #{orderId} and reviewerId = #{reviewerId}
select count(*) from review where postId = #{postId}
select count(*) from review where orderId = #{orderId}
select count(*) from review where revieweeId = #{revieweeId}
select count(*) from review where revieweeId = #{revieweeId} and rating >= #{threshold}
select avg(rating) from review where revieweeId = #{revieweeId}
